mapper.select: SELECT database_id FROM monitor_database WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND is_enabled = TRUE ORDER BY database_name LIMIT 1
SELECT database_id, database_name FROM monitor_database WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND is_enabled = TRUE ORDER BY database_name

SELECT hta.table_name, COALESCE(hta.avg_cache_hit_ratio, 0) AS avg_cache_hit_ratio, COALESCE(md.cache_hit_rate, '0') AS cache_hit_rate FROM hot_table_agg hta LEFT JOIN monitor_database md ON md.database_id = hta.database_id WHERE hta.database_id = #{databaseId} AND hta.collected_at = ( SELECT MAX(collected_at) FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} ) ORDER BY hta.avg_cache_hit_ratio DESC LIMIT 1

WITH ranked AS ( SELECT to_char(hta.collected_at, 'HH24:MI') AS time_label, hta.table_name, COALESCE(hta.vacuum_delay_seconds, 0) AS vacuum_delay_seconds FROM hot_table_agg hta WHERE hta.database_id = #{databaseId} AND hta.collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ), top3 AS ( SELECT table_name FROM ( SELECT table_name, MAX(vacuum_delay_seconds) AS max_delay, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY MAX(vacuum_delay_seconds) DESC) AS rnk FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY table_name ) x WHERE rnk <= 3 ) SELECT r.time_label, r.table_name, r.vacuum_delay_seconds FROM ranked r JOIN top3 t ON r.table_name = t.table_name ORDER BY r.time_label ASC, r.table_name ASC

WITH latest AS ( SELECT to_char(htr.collected_at, 'HH24:MI') AS time_label, htr.table_name, COALESCE(htr.n_dead_tup, 0) AS dead_tuple_count FROM hot_table_raw htr WHERE htr.database_id = #{databaseId} AND htr.collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ), top3 AS ( SELECT table_name FROM ( SELECT table_name, MAX(n_dead_tup) AS max_dead, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY MAX(n_dead_tup) DESC) AS rnk FROM hot_table_raw WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY table_name ) x WHERE rnk <= 3 ) SELECT l.time_label, l.table_name, l.dead_tuple_count FROM latest l JOIN top3 t ON l.table_name = t.table_name ORDER BY l.time_label ASC, l.table_name ASC

SELECT to_char(htr.collected_at, 'HH24:MI') AS time_label, SUM(COALESCE(htr.n_dead_tup, 0)) AS total_dead_tuple FROM hot_table_raw htr WHERE htr.database_id = #{databaseId} AND htr.collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY to_char(htr.collected_at, 'HH24:MI') ORDER BY time_label

SELECT hta.table_name, COALESCE(hta.total_seq_scan, 0) AS total_seq_scan, COALESCE(hta.total_idx_scan, 0) AS total_idx_scan FROM hot_table_agg hta WHERE hta.database_id = #{databaseId} AND hta.collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY (COALESCE(hta.total_seq_scan,0) + COALESCE(hta.total_idx_scan,0)) DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT hta.table_name, COALESCE(hta.total_tup_ins, 0) AS total_tup_ins, COALESCE(hta.total_tup_upd, 0) AS total_tup_upd, COALESCE(hta.total_tup_del, 0) AS total_tup_del FROM hot_table_agg hta WHERE hta.database_id = #{databaseId} AND hta.collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY (COALESCE(hta.total_tup_ins,0) + COALESCE(hta.total_tup_upd,0) + COALESCE(hta.total_tup_del,0)) DESC LIMIT 5

WITH recent_agg AS ( SELECT * FROM hot_table_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' ), recent_raw AS ( SELECT * FROM hot_table_raw WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' ) SELECT 0 AS hot_update_ratio, '1:' || COALESCE( ROUND( (COALESCE(AVG(ra.avg_dead_ratio), 0))::numeric, 2 )::text, '0' ) AS live_dead_tuple_ratio, COALESCE(SUM(rr.n_dead_tup), 0) AS dead_tuple_count, COALESCE(AVG(ra.avg_seq_scan_ratio), 0) AS seq_scan_ratio, COALESCE(AVG(ra.total_tup_upd + ra.total_tup_del), 0) AS update_delete_ratio, COALESCE(AVG(ra.vacuum_delay_seconds), 0) AS avg_vacuum_delay, COALESCE(SUM(ra.avg_bloat_percent) / 1000, 0) AS total_bloat_gb FROM recent_agg ra LEFT JOIN recent_raw rr ON rr.table_name = ra.table_name
